patches.hypothesis: The issue is caused by the StringBuilder's trim() method, which removes all leading and trailing whitespace from the string. To fix this, we need to modify the html() method to return the correct HTML content without any whitespace trimming.

The bug is caused by the StringBuilder.trim() method used in the html() method, which removes all leading and trailing white spaces even when the outputSettings().prettyPrint(false) is set in the test case. The solution is to remove the trim() method call in the html() method.
